reasoning: The chart fails to answer the specific business question, which asks for the *total* revenue per year (2021-2024). Instead, it plots monthly data points for all four years on a single line chart with months as the x-axis. This results in overlapping lines where different years share the same x-coordinates (e.g., Jan 2021 and Jan 2022 are both at x=0), making it impossible to distinguish trends or compare yearly totals visually without extreme difficulty. Furthermore, the annotations are cluttered and do not provide the aggregated annual sums requested. A bar chart showing total revenue per year would be far more appropriate.
suggested_improvement: Aggregate the monthly data into annual totals and use a column/bar chart with Years (2021, 2022, 2023, 2024) on the X-axis and Total Revenue on the Y-axis.
